icon.type: string | number | boolean | ReactElement | Iterable<ReactNode> | ReactPortal | ComponentClass<...> | FunctionComponent<...>
icon.description: Any `ReactNode`, but preferably `EuiAvatar`, or a `string` as an `EuiIcon['type']`.

iconAriaLabel.description:
Specify an `aria-label` for the icon when passed as an `IconType`.
If no `aria-label` is passed we assume the icon is purely decorative.
